title: terebinthus trijuga

The health benefits of Terebinthus trijuga include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes.
